notes: I dont know why, but every time i reach the Main-Menu of the Game, my Keyboard shuts down and wont respond till i restart my PC. This is the First Game that have such an Impact on my hardware. The Keyboard is completly new...so i doubt that it is a hardware-failure. I use OpenRazer and Polychromatic as the frontend. My Keyboard is a Razer BlackWidow Chroma V2. This is a really strange and suspicious behavior...
title: Razor2: Hidden Skies
